login.title: Customer Login
login.login_description: Enter your phone number to access billing information and services

otp.title: OTP Verification
otp.description: OTP code has been sent to your WhatsApp

dashboard.name: Name
dashboard.device_not_detected: Device not detected or not connected. WiFi settings only available when device is online.
dashboard.contact_admin_device: Please contact admin if your device is not detected in the system
dashboard.trouble_description: Report connection issues or internet service problems
dashboard.contact_support: If experiencing issues, please contact admin via WhatsApp:

billing.title: Billing Details
billing.payment_note: After making payment, please save the payment receipt and confirm to admin via WhatsApp
billing.no_invoices_desc: Invoices will appear here after admin creates invoices for you.

payment.no_gateway: Online payment not available. Please use manual payment methods below.
payment.failed_load: Failed to load payment options. Please try again.
payment.payment_opened: Payment page has been opened. Please continue payment in the new tab.

modal.restart_question: Are you sure you want to restart your device?
restart_effects: Internet connection will be temporarily disconnected
All connected devices will be disconnected

notifications.ssid_update_msg: WiFi 2.4GHz: {{ssid}} is being updated. Process will complete in a few seconds.
notifications.password_update_msg: WiFi password is being updated. Process will complete in a few seconds.

help.ssid_help: SSID must be 3-32 characters. WiFi 5GHz will automatically become "WiFiName-5G"
help.password_help: Password must be 8-63 characters for security
help.restart_help: Restarting device will temporarily disconnect internet connection (1-2 minutes)

whatsapp.welcome:
🌟 *Welcome to {{company}}!*

Hello {{name}}, thank you for using our service.

For help, type *menu* to see available options.
whatsapp.menu:
📋 *MAIN MENU*

1️⃣ Check Bill
2️⃣ Check Internet Status
3️⃣ Change WiFi Password
4️⃣ Restart Modem
5️⃣ Report Issue
6️⃣ Contact Info
7️⃣ Change Language

Type the number or name of the menu you want.
whatsapp.language_menu:
🌍 *CHOOSE LANGUAGE*

🇮🇩 1. Indonesian
🇺🇸 2. English

Reply with your choice number:
whatsapp.wifi_password_changed:
🔐 *WIFI PASSWORD SUCCESSFULLY CHANGED*

Your new WiFi password:
`{{password}}`

Please reconnect all devices with the new password.
whatsapp.device_restarted:
🔄 *MODEM SUCCESSFULLY RESTARTED*

Restart process is in progress.
Wait 2-3 minutes for connection to return to normal.
whatsapp.error_not_found: ❌ Sorry, your data was not found. Make sure your WhatsApp number is registered in our system.
whatsapp.error_device_offline: ⚠️ Your device is offline. Please check connection or contact CS.
whatsapp.error_invalid_command: ❓ Invalid command. Type *menu* to see available options.
whatsapp.payment_success:
🎉 *PAYMENT SUCCESSFUL!*

Hello {{name}},
Payment for invoice {{invoiceNumber}} of Rs {{amount}} has been successful.

Thank you!
whatsapp.payment_reminder:
⏰ *BILL REMINDER*

Hello {{name}},
Invoice {{invoiceNumber}} of Rs {{amount}} is due on {{dueDate}}.

Please make payment before that date.
whatsapp.suspension_warning:
⚠️ *SUSPENSION WARNING*

Hello {{name}},
Your internet service will be disconnected due to unpaid bills.

Please make payment immediately.
